transcript: Customer: Hi, this is Mark Henderson. I'm calling because my GFCI outlet is flickering. Dispatcher: Hi Mark, I'm sorry to hear that. Can you tell me what brand it is? Customer: It's a Eaton, maybe 10 years old. Dispatcher: Okay, and what's the service address? Customer: 456 Oak Avenue. Dispatcher: Got it. We can send a technician out Wednesday afternoon. Does that work? Customer: Yes, that would be great. Thank you.

expected_entities.equipment: Eaton GFCI outlet, maybe 10 years old
